form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr4) over 1980m at Tamworth, beaten 30 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $61. Before that, 8th (Sr2) over 1609m at Tamworth, beaten 35 m by Lachies Ideal (1:57.70) in NR up to 50 on March 12 at $151. Finds a nice race and can improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th (Sr4) over 1980m at Tamworth, beaten 30 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $61. Before that, 8th (Sr2) over 1609m at Tamworth, beaten 35 m by Lachies Ideal (1:57.70) in NR up to 50 on March 12 at $151. Finds a nice race and can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up inside the 100m and unable to be driven forward.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Cinnamon, who he meets again; when 21 metres sixth at this track over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN race on April 5. Wait until the form picks up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well beaten last start by Cinnamon, who he meets again; when 21 metres sixth at this track over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN race on April 5. Wait until the form picks up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the home straight and unable to be fully tested.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by 2.25 m (Sr2) at this track (2:08.90) beating Yarraman Tilly in 0-1 WIN on April 5. Nicely drawn and expected to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In good form recently. Last start won by 2.25 m (Sr2) at this track (2:08.90) beating Yarraman Tilly in 0-1 WIN on April 5. Nicely drawn and expected to measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 2 m finishing second behind Lachies Ideal at Tamworth over 1609m in a NR 45 to 48 on March 26 at $18. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Cinnamon at this track over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on April 5. In fine form. Bold showing expected again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid run when beaten by 2 m finishing second behind Lachies Ideal at Tamworth over 1609m in a NR 45 to 48 on March 26 at $18. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Cinnamon at this track over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on April 5. In fine form. Bold showing expected again.

form.formComment: Having her second run back from a spell. Game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1760m after showing early pace at this track beaten 2.25 m by Cinnamon (2:08.90) in 0-1 WIN on April 5. Can find the frame again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having her second run back from a spell. Game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1760m after showing early pace at this track beaten 2.25 m by Cinnamon (2:08.90) in 0-1 WIN on April 5. Can find the frame again.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1760m at this track beaten 14 m by Cinnamon (2:08.90) in 0-1 WIN on April 5. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Sr2) over 1980m at Tamworth, at the bell was 5th-9.76 beaten 13 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $4. Rates highly and likely to be prominent again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1760m at this track beaten 14 m by Cinnamon (2:08.90) in 0-1 WIN on April 5. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Sr2) over 1980m at Tamworth, at the bell was 5th-9.76 beaten 13 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $4. Rates highly and likely to be prominent again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly for some distance after the start.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m at Redcliffe, beaten 40 m by Heavensent (2:14.70) in 3yo Up to 1 LTW on February 11 at $41. Showed ability the run before when he won by 16 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Redcliffe (2:18.60) beating Tenggeri in MAIDEN on February 2 at $1.35. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Among the leading players.

formComments.title: TAB

Capable of more than he has shown recently. Among the leading players.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Led the one wide line throughout.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Cinnamon, a rival who he faces again; was restrained, when 18 metres fifth at this track over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN race on April 5. Has the task ahead.
